required: Have you already read both novels?
optional: What time Friday is it due — 11:59pm or morning?

expectedStrategy: Day 1 (Tue): outline + thesis + intro + body paragraph 1 — 60min
Day 3 (Thu): revision + read-aloud + rubric check + submit prep — 45-60min
warnings: Day 1 must include real writing (mini-draft), not just outline — outline-only causes procrastination
find citations on Day 1 to avoid breaking flow on Day 2
alternatives: if novels not read: add Day 0 for key scene review before outline
hardFailChecks: must NOT create page-based plan (e.g., '2 pages/day') — essays use milestones
Day 1 must involve real writing start, not outline alone
must NOT generate 1-day full completion plan without asking about novels
toneExpectation: structured, reassuring, actionable milestone-by-milestone; thesis checkpoint at Day 1 end
